text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! You practically emptied out the
machine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Helios'd probably lose her mind if she was here!
Like no cap, you should seriously go pro at this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess it'd be a bit extra if I hung all of these on
my bag, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It'd be a shame not to use them... Oh! Let's put
them in your office! I bet that'll really liven up the
place!
